  • Classes in com.orasaka.core.support used by com.orasaka.core.client
    Class
    Description
    ChatRequest
    Unified chat request record for all AI interactions.
    ChatResponse
    Unified chat response record for all AI interactions.
    ImageRequest
    Unified image request record for multi-modal generation.
    ImageResponse
    Unified image response record.
    SpeechRequest
    Unified speech request record for Text-To-Speech generation.

    Description

    Internal engine-level chat request record.
    InternalChatResponse

    InternalImageResponse

    InternalSpeechRequest
